full_text:
Lü Ya 呂雅
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lü Ya (呂雅)was born in Nanyang commandery. He was said to be pure, stern, and have literary talent. Lü Ya was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
